creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
The port editors/emacs-devel fails to compile with a linker error on my 10.0-stable system.

The output of the linker error is shown below:

sr/local/lib -lXfixes   -L/usr/local/lib -lxml2     -lutil -lncurses  -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -L/usr/local/lib -lglib-2.0 -lintl   -lgconf-2 -L/usr/local/lib -lglib-2.0 -lintl   -lgobject-2.0 -L/usr/local/lib -lglib-2.0 -lintl    -L/usr/local/lib -lfreetype   -lfontconfig -L/usr/local/lib -lfreetype   -lz -lbz2 -lotf -L/usr/local/lib -lfreetype   -lm17n-flt -L/usr/local/lib -lm17n-core   -L/usr/local/lib -lgnutls    -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -L/usr/local/lib -lglib-2.0 -lintl   -lm -lz
/usr/bin/ld: warning: libbz2.so.4, needed by /usr/local/lib/libfreetype.so, may conflict with libbz2.so.1
alloc.o: In function `Fmemory_info':
alloc.c:(.text+0x6dad): undefined reference to `sysinfo'
cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
gmake[3]: *** [temacs] Error 1
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/editors/emacs-devel/work/emacs-24.4.50.117564/src'
gmake[2]: *** [src] Error 2
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/editors/emacs-devel/work/emacs-24.4.50.117564'
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/editors/emacs-devel
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/editors/emacs-devel
